records.ety: [L. peculatus, p. p. of peculari to peculate, akin to peculium private property. See Peculiar.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Peculated (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Peculating.]

defs: To appropriate to one's own use the property of the public; to steal public moneys intrusted to one's care; to embezzle.
quotes: An oppressive, . . . rapacious, and peculating despotism.
